# UX Checklist: Compute Distance-to-School Signals for Family Suitability

**Purpose**: Validate UX requirements completeness, clarity, and coverage if school distance signals are surfaced to users.

**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/010-school-distance-signals/spec.md`

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are user-visible outcomes specified for success, no-schools sentinel values, routing fallback, and coordinate-unresolved omission? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [ ] CHK002 Are UI requirements defined for showing school distance metrics and family suitability? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK003 Are units and display formatting for school distance metrics specified? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Non-Functional Requirements
